title: Craft Your Brand Vision & Purpose
objective: Define where your brand is going and why it matters — creating a north star that guides every decision.
whyItMatters: Without vision, your brand drifts. A clear purpose magnetizes the right opportunities and repels the wrong ones.
workSummary: Articulate your brand purpose in one powerful sentence
Connect your values to your vision

aiPrompts.label: AI Power-Up Prompt
aiPrompts.prompt: My top 3 brand values are: [values]. My target audience is: [persona]. Help me write a compelling 3-year brand vision statement and a one-sentence brand purpose.

reflectionPrompts: What impact do I want my brand to have in 3 years?
Why does my work matter beyond income?
What legacy do I want my brand to leave?
actionSteps: Write your brand purpose in one sentence
Use the AI prompt to refine your vision and purpose
Read your vision aloud — does it energize you?
Save your vision where you'll see it daily
optionalPost: Defined my brand vision and purpose today. A brand without direction is just noise.
tomorrowPreview: Day 5 – Write Your One-Line Brand Positioning Statement
